headline: 15 contracts catalogued across BSC, Ethereum, and Arbitrum; developer docs (full multi-chain address list) inaccessible during this run, leaving Base, zkSync Era, Linea, Polygon zkEVM, OpBNB, Solana, and Monad chains unresolved.

findings.text: D1: BscScan name-tag search confirmed 0x0BFbCF9fa4f9C56B0F40a671Ad40E0805A091865 labeled 'PancakeSwap V3: Factory' with DEX and Factory Contract labels. Etherscan search snippet confirmed the same address carries the 'PancakeSwap V3: Factory' tag on Ethereum. Etherscan search snippets also surfaced 'PancakeSwap V3: Smart Router' (0x13f4ea83d0bd40e75c8222255bc855a974568dd4), 'PancakeSwap V3: Swap Router' (0x1b81d678ffb9c0263b24a97847620c99d213eb14), and 'PancakeSwap V3: Masterchef' (0x556b9306565093c855aea9ae92a594704c2cd59e) on Ethereum. Arbiscan search snippet confirmed 'PancakeSwap V3: Smart Router' at 0x32226588378236fd0c7c4053999f88ac0e5cac77 on Arbitrum. Block-explorer name-tag search for Base, zkSync Era, Linea, Polygon zkEVM, opBNB could not be performed in this run due to tool-call exhaustion.

D2: Developer docs page https://developer.pancakeswap.finance/contracts/v3/addresses was discovered via search (URL in search results) but returned a fetch error. The canonical deployed-contracts doc URL is identified but its contents could not be retrieved. Set deployed_contracts_doc to this URL as best-effort.

D3: No audit_links were pinned in the per-protocol context. No audit PDFs were discovered via the failed docs fetch. BscScan shows 'No Contract Security Audit Submitted' for the factory. Audit discovery incomplete.

D4: GitHub repo https://github.com/pancakeswap/pancake-v3-contracts confirmed at main branch; a 'deployments/' directory was observed in the file tree. Direct fetch of the deployments subdirectory was blocked by GitHub's domain restrictions. No pinned commit SHA could be obtained for the deployments artifacts. Repo structure suggests hardhat-deploy or manual JSON artifacts exist.

D5: BSC and Ethereum chains partially covered via D1. Arbitrum partially covered via search snippet. Base, zkSync Era, Linea, Polygon zkEVM, opBNB, Solana, and Monad: zero on-chain addresses surfaced due to tool-call exhaustion after initial probes. Recorded in unknowns.

D6: V3 Factory at 0x0BFbCF9fa4f9C56B0F40a671Ad40E0805A091865 (BSC) has created 1,025+ pools per BscScan transaction count. Factory enumeration (allPools / getPool) not attempted due to defipunkd API being inaccessible and tool-call limits. Cap notice: thousands of pools exist; factory address recorded, individual pool enumeration deferred.

D7: Role taxonomy applied: factory (PancakeV3Factory BSC/ETH), pool_deployer (PancakeV3PoolDeployer BSC), router (SmartRouter ETH/ARB, SwapRouter ETH), other (Masterchef V3 ETH), other (NonfungiblePositionManager BSC). Factory owner() and lmPoolDeployer() addresses not read on-chain this run due to API access failures.

D8: All admin_addresses entries trace to fetched BscScan page (factory, poolDeployer, creator EOA) or search-result snippets with name-tag labels (Ethereum and Arbitrum contracts). SubQuery docs provided BSC NonfungiblePositionManager address with named role. No address is included from training-data memory alone.

rationale.verdict: Discovery run walked BscScan (fetched), Etherscan search snippets, Arbiscan search snippets, GitHub repo index (fetched), and SubQuery third-party docs. 15 contracts catalogued across BSC, Ethereum, and Arbitrum. Developer docs page (canonical multi-chain address list) and GitHub deployments artifacts were inaccessible during this run, leaving 7 chains unresolved.

evidence.shows: BscScan page for PancakeSwap V3: Factory on BSC, labeled DEX / Factory Contract. Constructor arg decoded: poolDeployer = 0x41ff9AA7e16B8B1a8a8dc4f0eFacd93D02d071c9. ContractCreator = 0x40492810a7de793eef0dfb3a58338fdfea511047. Source verified, Solidity 0.7.6.

Official PancakeSwap V3 contracts GitHub repo at pancakeswap/pancake-v3-contracts. Contains deployments/ directory, projects/ directory, v3-deploy.mjs deploy script. Repo is public, 63 stars, 93 forks.
Etherscan name-tag 'PancakeSwap V3: Factory' on Ethereum for same address as BSC factory — surfaced via search result snippet.
Etherscan name-tag 'PancakeSwap V3: Smart Router' on Ethereum — surfaced via search result snippet showing SmartRouter contract source code.
Etherscan name-tag 'PancakeSwap V3: Swap Router' on Ethereum — surfaced via search result snippet, noted as possible proxy contract.
Etherscan name-tag 'PancakeSwap V3: Masterchef' on Ethereum — surfaced via search result snippet. Contract holds CAKE tokens, references NonfungiblePositionManager and WETH in constructor.
Arbiscan name-tag 'PancakeSwap V3: Smart Router' on Arbitrum — surfaced via search result snippet showing SmartRouter source code.
Third-party SubQuery docs explicitly name BSC NonfungiblePositionManager address as 0x46a15b0b27311cedf172ab29e4f4766fbe7f4364 alongside BSC factory 0x0bfbcf9fa4f9c56b0f40a671ad40e0805a091865.
DeFiLlama page confirms PancakeSwap AMM V3 category=Dexs; protocol fees 0.05% for most pools; Pancakeswap collects swap fees for Treasury and CAKE buyback/burn.

unknowns: D1: block-explorer name-tag search for Base (basescan.org), zkSync Era (era.zksync.network), Linea (lineascan.build), Polygon zkEVM (not enumerated), opBNB (opbnb.bscscan.com) not completed — tool-call budget exhausted
D2: developer docs page https://developer.pancakeswap.finance/contracts/v3/addresses returned fetch error; canonical multi-chain address table not retrieved
D3: no audit PDFs linked in protocol context; BscScan shows no audit submitted for factory; audit discovery incomplete
D4: GitHub deployments/ artifacts not readable (GitHub domain fetch blocked); no pinned commit SHA obtained
D5: Base chain — zero addresses surfaced from any source this run
D5: zkSync Era chain — zero addresses surfaced from any source this run
D5: Linea chain — zero addresses surfaced from any source this run
D5: Polygon zkEVM chain — zero addresses surfaced from any source this run
D5: opBNB chain — zero addresses surfaced from any source this run
D5: Solana chain — zero addresses surfaced (Solana is non-EVM; no explorer search attempted)
D5: Monad chain — zero addresses surfaced from any source this run
D6: BSC V3 Factory (0x0BFbCF9fa4f9C56B0F40a671Ad40E0805A091865) has created 1,025+ pools — individual pool enumeration deferred; factory address recorded with cap notice
D7: factory owner() live value not read on-chain (defipunkd API inaccessible); lmPoolDeployer() not read on-chain
D7: BSC MasterChef V3 address not confirmed from block-explorer — address_book had no entry and search did not surface BSC MasterChef V3 specifically
D8-offchain: defipunkd.com /api/contract/read endpoint returned access error for all attempted reads; all on-chain state claims are based on block-explorer source-code fetches only

admin_addresses.role: other (pool deployer, used by factory to deploy pools)
other (deployer EOA — contract creator of BSC factory)
other (MasterChef V3 — liquidity mining reward distribution)

protocol_metadata.about: PancakeSwap AMM V3 is a concentrated liquidity decentralized exchange forked from Uniswap V3, allowing liquidity providers to allocate capital within custom price ranges and earn swap fees. Users can swap ERC-20 tokens across multiple fee tiers (0.01%, 0.05%, 0.25%, 1%) on over ten chains including BSC, Ethereum, Base, Arbitrum, zkSync Era, Linea, Polygon zkEVM, and opBNB. Liquidity positions are represented as NFTs managed by the NonfungiblePositionManager contract; protocol fees are collected by the factory owner and used for CAKE token buybacks and treasury. The factory includes PancakeSwap-specific additions over Uniswap V3, such as a liquidity-mining pool deployer (lmPoolDeployer) and whitelist controls for certain fee tiers.
